items.title: EU diplomats scramble to overcome Hungary's threat to derail new sanctions on Russia
items.description: Hungary is blocking the EU’s latest sanctions plan against Russia, and it is also holding up new aid for Ukraine four years after Russia invaded

items.title: From dabblers to day traders, small investors' impact on Wall Street grows even in volatile market
items.description: For years, retail investors were dismissed by some on Wall Street as “dumb money.”

items.title: Supreme Court decision against Trump's tariffs raises uncertainty, but markets stay calm
items.description: China has urged the United States to stop imposing one-sided tariffs

items.title: US futures, bitcoin fall and Asian markets mixed after Supreme Court nixes tariffs
items.description: U.S. futures have dropped and Asian shares are mostly higher after the Supreme Court struck down most of President Donald Trump’s sweeping tariffs

items.title: From bakeries to beauty shops, Russian businesses are feeling the pain
items.description: As Moscow’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine marks four years, the pressure on Russia’s economy is starting to show
